Fixing 'Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout'
I tried to push code today and got "remote: Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout" from GitHub. Here's how to fix it.
Quick update — I recommend switching to SSH mode for GitHub. The fix below may not always work; SSH is more reliable. For setup details see

remote: Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout. Please use a personal access token instead.
remote: Please see https://github.blog/2020-07-30-token-authentication-requirements-for-api-and-git-operations/ for more information.
fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/xxxxx/xxxx.git/': The requested URL returned error: 403
remote: Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout. Please use a personal access token instead.
remote: Please see https://github.blog/2020-07-30-token-authentication-requirements-for-api-and-git-operations/ for more information.
fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/xxxxx/xxxx.git/': The requested URL returned error: 403
In short — GitHub doesn't want you authenticating over HTTPS with your password anymore. The simplest fix is to re-
So switching to the SSH clone fixes it.
If you don't want to re-clone, just change Git's remote URL to SSH:

Why does this happen? GitHub started gradually disabling username/password auth (i.e., HTTPS mode) for git operations starting November 13, 2020. But per the docs, accounts with 2FA enabled aren't affected by the new mechanism:
If you have two-factor authentication enabled for your account, you will not be affected by the future Git authentication changes.
So you can head to the
to enable it. (Though for some reason it didn't work for me right after enabling — maybe there's a delay.)
If you're using Hexo and it can't deploy, just update the deploy block in

deploy:
  type: git
  repo: https://github.com/hsiangfeng/hsiangfeng.github.io.git
  branch: master
  ignore_hidden: false

deploy:
  type: git
  repo: git@github.com:hsiangfeng/hsiangfeng.github.io.git
  branch: master
  ignore_hidden: false
